name: Lmon.shrubFrac
title: Percentage Cover by Shrub
description: fraction of entire grid cell  that is covered by shrub.
processing note: add scalar coordinate typeshrub and add "shrub" to the CF area type table.  Note that if this variable is independent of time, it should be stored only for a single time (user choice). CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: mean where land over all\_area\_types time: mean CMIP7:area: time: mean,
